description: Complete the brand identity system: add missing apps (Maps, Photos), 6 theme system, full Indic typography, WCAG contrast utilities, icon library (~100 core icons), app icon set generation, per-app logos, and brand guidelines documentation.
steps: 1. ADD MISSING APPS: Add `quantmaps` and `quantphotos` to packages/brand/src/apps.ts following the AppBrandConfig pattern. Use distinct hues (e.g. Maps=145 green-ish, Photos=290 magenta-ish). Create packages/brand/src/icons/quantmaps.ts and packages/brand/src/icons/quantphotos.ts with SVG icons matching the existing icon style (24x24 viewBox, stroke-based, 2px stroke). Update packages/brand/src/icons/index.ts to export them. Update packages/brand/src/index.ts to export the new apps and icons.

2. THEMES: Create packages/brand/src/themes.ts exporting 6 theme objects: `dark`, `light`, `neon`, `bharat` (Indic warm palette), `highContrast`, `colorblindSafe`. Each theme should define: background, foreground, surface, surfaceElevated, primary, accent, border, muted, mutedForeground, destructive, and ring colors. The `highContrast` theme MUST meet WCAG AAA (7:1 ratio). All other themes MUST meet WCAG AA (4.5:1 ratio). Export as `themes` record. Export the Theme type interface.

3. CONTRAST UTILITIES: Create packages/brand/src/contrast.ts with functions: `hexToRgb(hex)`, `relativeLuminance(r,g,b)`, `contrastRatio(color1, color2)`, `meetsAA(fg, bg)` (returns boolean, 4.5:1 for normal text), `meetsAAA(fg, bg)` (7:1 ratio). These are pure utility functions to validate palette accessibility.

4. INDIC TYPOGRAPHY: Expand packages/brand/src/typography.ts to add font stacks for all 5 Indic scripts: devanagari ('Noto Sans Devanagari'), tamil ('Noto Sans Tamil'), bengali ('Noto Sans Bengali'), telugu ('Noto Sans Telugu'), gujarati ('Noto Sans Gujarati'). Group them under a `fontFamily.indic` sub-object or as separate named exports (e.g. fontFamily.devanagari, fontFamily.tamil, etc.). Keep the existing `indic` key for backward compat.

5. ICON LIBRARY: Create packages/brand/src/icons/core.ts with ~100 commonly used UI icons as SVG strings. Categories: navigation (menu, arrow-left, arrow-right, arrow-up, arrow-down, chevron-left, chevron-right, chevron-up, chevron-down, home, back), actions (search, filter, sort, refresh, download, upload, share, copy, paste, cut, delete, edit, save, undo, redo, plus, minus, close, check, x), communication (bell, inbox, send, attach, link, unlink), media (play, pause, stop, volume-up, volume-down, volume-mute, mic, mic-off, camera, image, film, music), status (info, warning, error, success, help, loading, clock), interface (settings, user, users, lock, unlock, eye, eye-off, star, heart, bookmark, pin, flag, tag, grid, list, columns, maximize, minimize, external-link, more-horizontal, more-vertical), file (file, folder, folder-open, document, code, archive, cloud, database), device (phone, tablet, laptop, monitor, printer, wifi, bluetooth, battery). Each icon: 24x24 viewBox, stroke='currentColor', stroke-width=2, fill='none', stroke-linecap='round', stroke-linejoin='round'. Export a `coreIcons` record mapping name to SVG string, and also export a `CoreIconName` type.

6. APP ICON SET UTILITY: Create packages/brand/src/icons/app-icons.ts with a function `generateAppIconSet(appId: string)` that returns an object with SVG strings at standard sizes: { favicon16: string, favicon32: string, pwa192: string, pwa512: string, ios180: string, android192: string, maskable512: string }. It should take the app's existing icon SVG and wrap it in appropriately sized containers. For maskable icons, add the required safe-zone padding (inner 80% circle). Also create a helper `generateFaviconSvg(appId: string)` that returns a minimal SVG suitable for use as a favicon.

7. PER-APP LOGOS: Create packages/brand/src/logos/app-logos.ts that exports logo SVGs for each of the 16 apps. Each app logo combines a small version of the app icon with the app name as a wordmark. Export as a record: `appLogos: Record<string, { light: string; dark: string }>`. Use the app's brand color for the icon portion and dark/light text for the wordmark.

8. UPDATE TOKENS: Update packages/brand/src/tokens.ts to include theme CSS generation. Add a function `generateThemeCSS(themeName: string)` that produces CSS custom properties for the specified theme. Import themes from ./themes.

9. UPDATE BARREL: Update packages/brand/src/index.ts to re-export all new modules: themes (themes, Theme type), contrast utilities, core icons (coreIcons, CoreIconName), app icon set (generateAppIconSet, generateFaviconSvg), app logos (appLogos).

10. UPDATE TESTS: Update packages/brand/src/__tests__/brand.test.ts to cover: (a) new apps (quantmaps, quantphotos) are in the registry (update count from 14 to 16), (b) all 6 themes export correctly and have required keys, (c) contrast utilities work (test known color pairs), (d) all themes pass their required WCAG level (AA for most, AAA for highContrast) using the contrast utility, (e) coreIcons has at least 80 entries and all are valid SVG strings, (f) generateAppIconSet returns all required sizes, (g) appLogos has entries for all 16 apps with light and dark variants.

11. BRAND GUIDELINES DOC: Create docs/brand/BRAND.md with comprehensive brand guidelines covering: mission/vision, logo usage rules (clear space, minimum size, don'ts), color palette documentation (all hex values, usage guidance), typography guide (font stacks per script, size scale), iconography principles, motion principles, theme descriptions, accessibility requirements (WCAG targets), and app identity system overview.

12. FINAL TYPECHECK AND LINT: Ensure all new code passes `pnpm --filter @quant/brand typecheck` and `pnpm --filter @quant/brand lint`. Fix any TypeScript strict-mode issues (noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, noUncheckedIndexedAccess).
acceptance_criteria: apps registry contains 16 apps (all 14 existing + quantmaps + quantphotos)
6 themes exported from themes.ts with all required color keys
contrast.ts exports working hexToRgb, relativeLuminance, contrastRatio, meetsAA, meetsAAA functions
typography.ts includes font stacks for Devanagari, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Gujarati
coreIcons contains at least 80 icon SVG strings
generateAppIconSet returns objects with favicon16, favicon32, pwa192, pwa512, ios180, android192, maskable512 keys
appLogos has light/dark variants for all 16 apps
generateThemeCSS produces valid CSS for each theme
TypeScript strict mode passes (pnpm --filter @quant/brand typecheck exits 0)
findings: All 16 steps completed successfully. 105 core icons generated (exceeds 80 minimum). 30 tests passing. Typecheck, test, and lint all green. Prettier ran via lint-staged on commit with no issues. The noUncheckedIndexedAccess constraint required using non-null assertions (!) on array indices from .map() results in contrast.ts.
